input.user_input: Replace all references to 'Acme Corp' with 'Pinnacle Technologies Inc.' throughout the agreement. There are probably 15–20 instances.

actual: Please upload the agreement you would like me to modify. Once you have provided the document, I can update all references from "Acme Corp" to "Pinnacle Technologies Inc." for you.
